{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320171337C9380A185E3934BAFFF9"}"},"total":12},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7308723790149878537","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"文笔幽默风趣，与现代语言相结合，通俗易懂。诙谐有趣的文字，深深的吸引着我，往下翻阅的兴趣。这本书，让我看到了很多历史人物，包括词帝李煜的一生，为什么是词帝，是拿江山去写词的人，都是拿国家兴亡换来的血泪史，我们不禁会感到悲哀与心酸。该章节中，多次引用诗词，名言，还有文言文，能够更好的去理解人物心理过程，去诠释人物所存在的时代背景。我们看到了诗圣杜甫，了解了他心系天下，能够站在百姓的角度，真正的为贫苦百姓发声，做到了真正的为人民服务。同时，也了解到了徐霞客，很多人都没听到过，我也是今天才知道，他是地理学家，看过很多山川，了解过许许多多的地貌，为后人也留下了诸多宝贵的财富。读书可以让我们去浅显的见证一个人物的一生，见证一个故事的转转合合，让我们不断地审视自己，更新自己，替换掉自己一些陈旧的思想，更替着自己想要做什么，成为什么样的人，去不断地缝缝补补，然后不断的蜕变，一次一次的成为一个更好的人。希望可以被更多的人看到这本书，非常的完美，无可挑剔。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1701695678,"group_id":"7235893162902817807","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"喜欢美食，喜欢辣妹装，喜欢美女。最最喜欢的是自己的处女座。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+Q8WUa2JAvhuxrj32IL3f2Jw7TR4YGzX+7X3cVVz5PQ","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0c2e4d958c3642ed93ee7e1bdc500eda~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776531113&x-signature=kEgakueX5RfuFcEO8H9bPNTP%2B1o%3D","user_id":"2027925828535351","user_name":"陌上青卿"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2027925828535351","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7235893162902817807","book_info":{"abstract":"你以为的古代文人知书达礼，实际上的古代文人让人捧腹不止！《朕说历史漫画：历史原来这么有趣》百万粉丝公众号“朕说”大爆料，孔子竟被骂了一辈子的“傻子”，陶渊明其实不会种田，李白还是个“旅游达人”！
22个古代文人墨客，52条详细背景知识点，用最严谨、最认真的历史，编最搞笑、最幽默的段子，漫画的形式趣味讲述那些正经的文人墨客背后的故事，让你轻轻松松看透中国2000多年历史。每一页都有料，拿起书就哈哈笑！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/08c8f6678c31c8a6d29bf574ca0de3af~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"朕说 著","author_id":"","book_id":"7235893162902817807","book_name":"朕说历史漫画：历史原来这么有趣","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#402010","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"4.7万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":241,"name":"历史文化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=241&name=历史文化&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7475301207221750846","read_count":"3962","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"44760"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"24","tags":"历史,历史文化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/08c8f6678c31c8a6d29bf574ca0de3af~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779182018&x-signature=73stbbQS6f5iN9RPoEOT4MIR8Ig%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3.486092e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320171337C9380A185E3934BAFFF9"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读58分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3486,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":970},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7497968745026798360","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"书里面的人物都是以前上学的时候在课本上认识的，那些诗人词人的作品丶诗藉都学过，但在这本书里更深度的了解了他们的事迹和创作过程，好看好看，我个人很喜欢[送心][送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1745760949,"group_id":"7235893162902817807","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我就是我，不需要讨好任何人的我","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4ZRclpObH0CNWpOL81VfsQBbBo35j
